input.episode_topic: Why we dream — and whether dreams actually mean anything according to current neuroscience
input.guest: A neuroscientist who studies sleep and dreaming, author of a recent book on dream research
input.compelling_moment: Guest said 'Your brain doesn't stop working when you sleep — it just stops pretending to be rational'
input.ctas: Subscribe + leave a review + check show notes for the guest's book

input.episode_topic: How to build a morning routine that actually sticks
Why natural wine divides European winemakers — the philosophical and practical debate between traditional and natural winemaking in France and Italy
input.guest: A fourth-generation Burgundy winemaker who is outspoken about what she sees as the natural wine movement overcorrecting against conventional winemaking
input.tone: Knowledgeable, conversational, respects tradition but open to new ideas
input.compelling_moment: Guest said 'My grandmother would have been horrified by what some people call natural wine — and she never used a single chemical in her vineyard'
input.ctas: Subscribe + visit the show website for the wine list mentioned in this episode
